hero.title: FV Measurement Export in a Few Clicks
hero.subtitle: Stop spending entire days copying data into spreadsheets. Upload .ZST files, select columns, and export inspection reports for grid operators and insurers.

problem.title: The Problem You Know
problem.description: A measuring device for €4,000, but the export software is a disaster. Companies pay employees who spend entire days just copying data into tables – up to €400 per project.
problem.point2: A full day of manual work per project

solution.title: Solution in a Few Clicks
solution.description: Upload .ZST files from measuring devices, select columns to export, and download CSV ready for inspection reports.

speed.title: Speed
speed.desc: Minutes instead of a full day. Automation instead of manual work.

compliance.title: Regulatory Compliance
compliance.desc: Bulletproof reports for grid operators and insurers.

roi.title: Fast ROI
roi.desc: One-time investment of €1,200 pays back in the first few projects.

quality.title: Top Quality
quality.desc: A tool for professionals who don't compromise.

cta.title: Stop Wasting Time
cta.subtitle: One-time access for €1,200. No monthly fees.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.q1: What exactly do I get for €1,200?
faq.a1: One-time access to the PVCHECK Export application. You can upload .ZST files, select columns, and export CSV without limits. No monthly fees.
faq.q2: Which devices does the app work with?
faq.a2: The app processes .ZST files from measuring devices used for PV inspections. Verify specific compatibility with your device manufacturer.
faq.a3: No. Just upload files, check the columns, and click Export. The interface is intuitive.
faq.a4: We currently offer one-time payment. For corporate customers, we can arrange invoicing individually.
faq.a5: After purchase, you get access to documentation and email support.
